title: Switch proxy service back to allorigins.win

requirements.summary: Replace the current CORS proxy base URL with allorigins.win in useTabs.ts for all proxied tab navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Proxy URL construction in useTabs.ts uses allorigins.win as the proxy base.
Opening a URL in a tab produces an iframe src that begins with the allorigins.win endpoint.
No references to the previously used proxy service remain in useTabs.ts, HomeSearch.tsx, or TabContent.tsx.

file_operations.description: Update the getProxiedUrl function to use https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url= as the proxy base URL instead of the current proxy service. Ensure the proxy-bypass logic for search engines remains intact.

requirements.summary: Update hardcoded proxy references in HomeSearch.tsx and TabContent.tsx to use allorigins.win consistently
acceptanceCriteria: HomeSearch.tsx renders the correct allorigins.win proxy URL in the address bar and iframe.
TabContent.tsx constructs iframe src URLs using allorigins.win.
ProxyInfoPanel or any proxy label text reflects allorigins.win as the active proxy.

file_operations.description: Update any hardcoded proxy URL construction to use allorigins.win, ensuring the address bar and iframe src display the correct proxy base URL. Update any proxy status text or labels to reflect allorigins.win.
Update iframe src construction to use allorigins.win for proxied URLs. Ensure any proxy-related UI text or error messages reference allorigins.win as the active proxy service.
Update the proxy configuration details displayed in the info panel to reflect allorigins.win as the active CORS proxy service, replacing any references to the previous proxy.
